unitName: 新毛茸茸的朋友 | A New Furry Friend

article.title: A New Furry Friend 新毛茸茸的朋友

paragraphs.english: In September, Marcus started going to a new school. He was shy and could not make any friends. His parents were worried.
sentences: In September, Marcus started going to a new school.
He was shy and could not make any friends.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 九月，馬庫斯開始上新學校。他很害羞，交不到任何朋友。他的父母很擔心。
translation_sentences: 🌐 九月，馬庫斯開始上新學校。
他很害羞，交不到任何朋友。

implication.english: 💡 The story introduces a common problem: a child struggling to adapt to a new environment and feeling lonely.
implication.chinese: 💡 故事引入一個常見問題：孩子在適應新環境時感到困難和孤單。[換句話說]：馬庫斯剛轉學，因為害羞交不到朋友，爸媽看在眼裡很著急。

paragraphs.english: One day, Marcus showed his mum a picture of a kitten. 'Can we adopt her?' he asked excitedly. His eyes lit up as he looked at the picture. 'I'm not sure if we can keep the cat, but we can foster her,' his mum replied.
sentences: One day, Marcus showed his mum a picture of a kitten.
'Can we adopt her?' he asked excitedly.
His eyes lit up as he looked at the picture.
'I'm not sure if we can keep the cat, but we can foster her,' his mum replied.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 有一天，馬庫斯給媽媽看一張小貓的照片。「我們可以領養牠嗎？」他興奮地問。他看著照片時眼睛亮了起來。「我不確定我們能不能養貓，但我們可以中途照顧牠，」媽媽回答。
translation_sentences: 🌐 有一天，馬庫斯給媽媽看一張小貓的照片。
「我們可以領養牠嗎？」他興奮地問。
他看著照片時眼睛亮了起來。
「我不確定我們能不能養貓，但我們可以中途照顧牠，」媽媽回答。

implication.english: 💡 'Lit up' shows Marcus's hope and excitement. 'Foster' means temporary care, which is a compromise from his mother.
implication.chinese: 💡 '眼睛亮了起來'顯示馬庫斯的希望和興奮。'中途照顧'意味著臨時照護，這是媽媽的妥協。[換句話說]：馬庫斯看到小貓的照片眼睛都亮了，媽媽雖然還不確定要不要長期養，但願意先試試看當中途家庭。

paragraphs.english: Marcus and his parents looked after the cat together. He learnt how to be a responsible pet owner along the way. 'Coco's fur is so soft,' Marcus said while brushing its fur. Coco purred contentedly. He shared photos of the small orange cat on social media. Many of his classmates liked the photos and said they wanted to meet Coco.
sentences: Marcus and his parents looked after the cat together.
He learnt how to be a responsible pet owner along the way.
'Coco's fur is so soft,' Marcus said while brushing its fur.
He shared photos of the small orange cat on social media.
Many of his classmates liked the photos and said they wanted to meet Coco.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 馬庫斯和他的父母一起照顧這隻貓。他因此學會了如何成為一個負責任的寵物主人。「Coco的毛好柔軟，」馬庫斯一邊刷毛一邊說。Coco滿足地咕嚕叫。他在社交媒體上分享了這隻小橘貓的照片。許多同學按讚，並說他們想見Coco。
translation_sentences: 🌐 馬庫斯和他的父母一起照顧這隻貓。
他因此學會了如何成為一個負責任的寵物主人。
「Coco的毛好柔軟，」馬庫斯一邊刷毛一邊說。
他在社交媒體上分享了這隻小橘貓的照片。
許多同學按讚，並說他們想見Coco。

implication.english: 💡 Taking care of the cat teaches Marcus responsibility. The cat's positive reaction and classmates' interest show the growing bond.
implication.chinese: 💡 照顧貓咪讓馬庫斯學會負責任。貓咪的反應和同學的興趣顯示了逐漸建立的情感連結。[換句話說]：照顧Coco的過程中，馬庫斯學會了怎麼當個好主人，Coco也很享受，同學們看到照片都說想來看牠。

paragraphs.english: In November, the family decided to adopt the cat. They invited a few of Marcus' friends over for a party to welcome this new family member.
sentences: In November, the family decided to adopt the cat.
They invited a few of Marcus' friends over for a party to welcome this new family member.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 十一月，這家人決定領養這隻貓。他們邀請了馬庫斯的一些朋友來參加派對，歡迎這位新家庭成員。
translation_sentences: 🌐 十一月，這家人決定領養這隻貓。
他們邀請了馬庫斯的一些朋友來參加派對，歡迎這位新家庭成員。

implication.english: 💡 The story has a happy ending: the cat becomes a permanent family member, and Marcus gains friends through this shared joy.
implication.chinese: 💡 故事有個快樂的結局：貓咪成為永久的家庭成員，而馬庫斯也透過分享這份喜悅交到了朋友。[換句話說]：最後Coco正式成為家裡的一份子，馬庫斯還辦派對邀請同學來慶祝，終於不再孤單了。
